name: IGas Energy plc
summary: IGas Energy plc operates as an oil and gas exploration and production company Britain. The company holds interests in the 55 licenses at onshore locations in the Weald Basin in the southern England; the Gainsborough Trough in the East Midlands; the Bowland Basin in the North West of England; and the Inner Moray Firth in Scotland. It also generates electricity. The company was founded in 2003 and is based in London, the United Kingdom.
